response.objective_caption: A tightly framed indoor photograph of a person with long reddish-brown hair wearing a blue garment, with framed pictures visible on a wall in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tightly framed indoor photograph of a person with long reddish-brown hair wearing a blue garment, with framed pictures visible on a wall in the background, rendered with extreme intentional blur and dissolved detail so that facial features and textures melt into soft, indistinct ambiguity.
